VAL-RELAY-001.evidence: `npx vitest run test/relay/async-core.test.ts --reporter=verbose --maxConcurrency=7` passed. Covered send/inbox delivery and ID/metadata matching via tests including: 'alice can send a message to bob via relay', 'bob sees alice message in inbox', and 'message IDs match between send response and inbox'.

VAL-RELAY-002.evidence: Same async-core suite passed. Read-vs-ack separation verified by passing tests: 'reading a message does not change its state from delivered', 'reading does not imply ack', 'ack can happen independently of read', and 'read then ack produces correct final state'.

VAL-RELAY-003.evidence: Same async-core suite passed. Ack convergence verified by tests: 'sender view reflects acked state after recipient acks', 'recipient view and sender view converge on same acked state', and 'device-level view reflects same state as account-level view'.

VAL-RELAY-008.evidence: `npx vitest run test/relay/spoof-prevention.test.ts --reporter=verbose --maxConcurrency=7` passed (16/16). Spoof prevention validated by tests rejecting spoofed sender fields with 403 (e.g. sender_id/sender_login mismatch) and ensuring legitimate sends use authenticated principal identity.
